phases.intro_dialogue: Marn blocks the way for the old prototype practice fight.
The framework boss tests command flow.
The framework boss changes pattern rules.

poojan_strength_test.bullet_legend: Badge warnings and rainy revolver lanes.
poojan_strength_test.pacing_note: Readable first boss pacing: badge warning, clear lanes, short ring burst.

phases.intro_dialogue: Poojan tests whether Shrububu's door-slam strength was a fluke.
phases.readability_hint: Poojan marks four badge lanes before the shots arrive.

patterns.safe_hint: Four badge lanes. Stand between the warnings.

phases.intro_dialogue: Poojan fires warning shots through the rainy harbour mist.
phases.readability_hint: The ring burst starts from the center and leaves time to sidestep.

patterns.safe_hint: Ring burst starts from center. Move after the badge flash.

satyaki_tirumal_boss.bullet_legend: Dodge legal papers, broken rings, and property deeds.
satyaki_tirumal_boss.pacing_note: Readable main boss pacing: papers fall first, then slower sweeping property beams.

phases.intro_dialogue: Satyaki hurls divorce papers, broken rings, and property deeds.
phases.readability_hint: Marked columns show where legal papers will fall.

patterns.safe_hint: Papers fall from marked columns. Start under a gap.

phases.intro_dialogue: The harbour court records spiral into a money storm.
phases.readability_hint: Property beams flash before sweeping across the box.

patterns.safe_hint: Property beams sweep sideways. Cross after the flash.
